name: Song of Youth
overview: During the Ming Dynasty, Lin Shaochun, the daughter of a disgraced official, joins a performing troupe to survive. Determined to restore her family's honor, she disguises herself as a man to take the civil service exams. Along the way, she meets Sun Yulou, a wealthy heir who falls for her and defies his family to support her ambitions. However, as she uncovers the truth behind her family's downfall, she must choose between love and justice.

trailers.title: 《玉楼春》精彩片花来袭，白鹿金晨搞笑驯夫，演员阵容豪华，新时代琼瑶你不容错过！ | 主演：金晨  白鹿  王一哲 | 欢娱影视
